---
interval: 1h
tz: UTC
timeout: 30m
agent: codex
model: sonnet
maxTurns: 100
name: Full Config Heartbeat
description: A heartbeat with all possible configuration options
sandbox: workspace-write
networkAccess: false
permissions: skip
---

This is a comprehensive heartbeat with all configuration options set.

Perform the following tasks:
1. Check system status
2. Generate report
3. Deliver to configured channel
